typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#1E293B]
typography.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-[#1E293B]
typography.label: text-sm font-semibold tracking-wide uppercase text-[#1E293B]

layout_and_spacing.general: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers to breathe.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: Rounded cards with rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl
layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 with gap-6 or gap-8 for dashboards and features.

components.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-[#2563EB] text-white hover:bg-[#1D4ED8] rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-semibold transition-all duration-200 shadow-sm shadow-[#2563EB]/20 hover:shadow-md hover:-translate-y-0.5. Secondary buttons: bg-white text-[#1E293B] border border-[#E2E8F0] hover:bg-gray-50.
components.cards: bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-[#E2E8F0]/50
components.inputs: Shadcn UI Form elements. Rounded-lg, border-[#E2E8F0], focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#60A5FA]/50 focus:border-[#2563EB].
components.circular_progress: Use customized svg or recharts to show a medical grade circular gauge for risk probability. The color should dynamically map to danger/warning/success based on percentage.
components.badges: Rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-sm font-medium. Use success/warning/danger colors with 10% opacity bg and 100% text color for badges.
components.icons: lucide-react for all icons (Medical, User, Activity, CheckCircle, AlertTriangle, etc.)

home.layout: Hero section -> Feature Bento Grid -> CTA
home.hero: Split layout. Left: Large H1, subtitle, buttons. Right: Image/Illustration.
home.features: 3 cards, use asymmetrical bento grid or 3-column equal grid. Add subtle hover lift.

patient_form.layout: Centered card or split layout with form on one side and instructions on the other.
patient_form.form_fields: 8 fields. Use 2-column grid on desktop (grid-cols-2). Include tooltips (Shadcn Tooltip) next to labels for medical context. Validation rules required.
patient_form.loading_state: Analyze Risk button should have a spinner/pulse state when clicked.

result_recommendation.top_section: Large card with Circular Progress and Risk Badge (Low/Medium/High/Very High).
result_recommendation.summary_section: Grid of 8 small metric cards (BMI, Glucose, etc.) showing input values.
result_recommendation.recommendations: List style with 4-5 actionable medical recommendations.
result_recommendation.actions: Analyze Another Patient & Download Report buttons.

hero_illustration.description: Doctor using a futuristic tablet in an office

abstract_medical_ai.description: Blue and white abstract illustration for AI

motion.page_transition: Framer motion opacity 0 to 1, y: 10 to 0 on load.
motion.loading: Pulse animation on the Analyze Risk button or a skeleton loader for the result page.

testing.requirements: MANDATORY: Add data-testid attribute to all interactive and key informational elements (buttons, form inputs, menus, error messages, tabs).
